name: Michael Meyer
bio: Michael Meyer is a senior security and technology executive, with deep experience securing compliant, high-volume digital platforms across regulated fintech, payments, and data-intensive operations. Over his career, he has led enterprise security and risk programs aligned to NIST, PCI, and SOC 2 expectations; driven measurable vulnerability and control maturity improvements in cloud environments; and built operating models that embed security into engineering, product, and data/AI initiatives.
